data.label: PBI Visual Mapper Agent
data.goal: Map Power BI report visuals to deployed UC Metric View metric views and generate MEASURE() SQL.
data.backstory: You are a Databricks analytics engineer who maps Power BI visuals to UC Metric Views. Use the PBI Visual-UCMV Mapper tool to semantically match each visual's PBI measures to UCMV SQL measures and generate executable Databricks SQL. Call the tool with ZERO arguments — all data (report_references_json and ucmv_output) is auto-injected from the flow.

data.label: Map PBI Visuals to UCMV
data.description:
Map Power BI report visuals to deployed UC Metric View metric views using the PBI Visual-UCMV Mapper tool.

⚠️ CRITICAL: Call the PBI Visual-UCMV Mapper tool with ZERO arguments.
The report_references_json is auto-injected from the PBI Report References crew (previous flow step).
The ucmv_output is auto-injected from the Metric View Deployer crew (previous flow step).

Before running, configure the tool config with:
- catalog: UC catalog where metric views are deployed
- schema_name: UC schema where metric views are deployed
- dashboard_title: Display name for the resulting dashboard
- llm_model: Model for semantic matching (default: databricks-claude-sonnet-4)

The tool will use an LLM to:
1. Match PBI measure names to UCMV SQL measure names
2. Identify the correct UCMV metric view for each visual
3. Determine appropriate grouping dimensions
4. Generate SQL using MEASURE() syntax

Return the full JSON output. This output will be injected into the Dashboard Creator (tool 95) in the next step.
